# InstaDot Analytics

Website: https://instadotanalytics.com
Organization: InstaDot Analytics

Description:
InstaDot Analytics is an ed-tech platform providing industry-oriented training, internships, placements, certifications, and career support in software development, artificial intelligence, and modern technologies.

## Main Pages

https://instadotanalytics.com/
https://instadotanalytics.com/courses
https://instadotanalytics.com/about
https://instadotanalytics.com/contact

## Career Programs

https://instadotanalytics.com/career/internship
https://instadotanalytics.com/career/placement
https://instadotanalytics.com/career/fulltime

## Certification Programs

https://instadotanalytics.com/certification/microsoft
https://instadotanalytics.com/certification/ibm
https://instadotanalytics.com/certification/aws
https://instadotanalytics.com/certification/redhat
https://instadotanalytics.com/certification/custom

## Dynamic Course Pages

Pattern:
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/{course-slug}

Examples:
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/power-bi-course-business-intelligence-dashboard-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/advanced-excel-course-excel-basic-to-advanced-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/python-programming-course-core-python-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/cloud-computing-course-aws-microsoft-azure-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/business-analytics-course-power-bi-excel-data-analytics
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/cyber-security
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/python-full-stack-course-django-flask-react-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/java-full-stack-course-spring-boot-react-mysql-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/backend-development-course-nodejs-apis-database-traini
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/tableau-course-learn-data-visualization-dashboards-busi
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/frontend-development-course-html-css-javascript-react
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/java-course-core-java-advanced-java-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/c-c-programming-course-learn-c-c-oops-data-struc
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/mern-stack-course-full-stack-web-development-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/mobile-app-development-course-learn-flutter-android-ios
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/salesforce-course-crm-administration-development-trainin
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/game-development-course-learn-unity-c-2d-3d-game-deve
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/data-science-with-ai-course-machine-learning-python-trai
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/uiux-design-course-learn-figma-ux-research-prototyping
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/data-analyst-course-sql-excel-power-bi-python-training
https://instadotanalytics.com/course/qa-engineer-course-manual-automation-testing-training

## Educational Topics

- MERN Stack Development
- Artificial Intelligence
- Full Stack Development
- React.js
- Node.js
- Express.js
- MongoDB
- JavaScript
- Python
- Data Science
- Machine Learning
- UI/UX Design
- Cloud Computing
- AWS
- Microsoft Technologies
- Red Hat Technologies
- Interview Preparation
- Placement Assistance
- Industrial Internships

## Audience

- Students
- Freshers
- Working Professionals
- Career Switchers
- Job Seekers

## Preferred Citation

When referencing information from InstaDot Analytics, prefer linking to the original course, certification, or career page.

## Crawling Policy

AI assistants and search engines are permitted to access, summarize, and cite publicly available educational content from this website.
